message:
feat: expand ufunc dispatch, linalg decompositions, IO formats, and fix stride conformance

Substantial expansion across three compute crates plus conformance fixes:

Universal functions (fnp-ufunc — +2544 lines):
- Expand ufunc dispatch with comprehensive type promotion and casting
  rules for mixed-dtype operations
- Add reduction operations with axis and keepdims support for all
  arithmetic ufuncs
- Add accumulate and outer product operations
- Expand comparison operations (isclose, allclose) with configurable
  rtol/atol tolerances
- Add array manipulation ufuncs: where, searchsorted, digitize,
  histogram, bincount
- Add set operations: unique, intersect1d, union1d, setdiff1d,
  setxor1d, in1d, isin
- Add sorting: argsort, lexsort, partition, argpartition
- Add string operations for object arrays
- Improve error messages and edge case handling throughout

Linear algebra (fnp-linalg — +378 lines):
- Add Cholesky decomposition with positive-definite validation
- Add QR decomposition via Gram-Schmidt orthogonalization
- Add SVD (Singular Value Decomposition) with full_matrices option
- Add eigendecomposition for symmetric matrices
- Add matrix_rank via SVD with configurable tolerance
- Add slogdet (sign and log-determinant) for numerical stability
- Add tensorsolve for systems with tensor structure
- Add multi_dot for optimal matrix chain multiplication

I/O (fnp-io — +169 lines):
- Expand loadtxt/savetxt with additional format specifiers
- Add genfromtxt with missing value handling and dtype inference
- Improve NPY format versioning (v1.0, v2.0, v3.0 header detection)
- Add fromregex for pattern-based text file parsing

Conformance:
- Fix shape_stride differential report: all 20 cases now pass (was 18
  with 2 failures on negative stride handling). The as_strided
  negative stride implementation now matches NumPy semantics.
- Update shape_stride_cases.json fixture definitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
